title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: SANDY HEALTH CENTER OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 39740 Pleasant Street Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Individuals with a income below 250% FPL. Out of network private insurance plans are not eligible for any specialty care referrals. Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 10am-7pm (503) 655-8471 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 655-8471 Primary Care INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Accepts most OHP plans and some private insurance. Minimum $20 fee due at time of medical appointment for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Photo identification and Insurance card, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday-Thursday 8am-7pm Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SANDY HEALTH CENTER
